summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MTF Heatmap feature. Backend: 10/10 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All key features verified working correctly via Playwright automation.
passed_tests: Backend: Access gate works with code Bullishalmarkhan7.7 - SUCCESS
Backend: /api/auto-trade/scan returns mtf_heatmap array - SUCCESS (23 entries)
Backend: /api/auto-trade/scan returns mtf_heatmap_distribution object - SUCCESS
Backend: mtf_heatmap_distribution has all 6 categories (BULLISH_ALIGNED, BEARISH_ALIGNED, MOMENTUM_CANDIDATE, NEAR_MISS, MIXED, CONFLICT) - SUCCESS

Backend: mtf_heatmap entries have required fields (symbol, category, direction, trend_15m, structure_5m, timing_1m, timing_status, confidence, rel_vol, above_vwap, setup_type, reject_reasons) - SUCCESS
Backend: Category classification consistent - CONFLICT entries have has_tf_conflict=true, aligned entries have mtf_aligned=true - SUCCESS
Backend: Direction consistency - BULLISH_ALIGNED has direction=LONG, BEARISH_ALIGNED has direction=SHORT - SUCCESS
Backend: /api/auto-trade/mtf-heatmap dedicated endpoint returns 200 with heatmap and distribution - SUCCESS
Backend: Heatmap entries sorted by confidence descending - SUCCESS
Backend: timing_status values are valid (entry_ready, early, weak) - SUCCESS
Backend: Timeframe values are valid (bullish, bearish, ranging, neutral, mixed) - SUCCESS
Frontend: MTF Heatmap tab exists and is clickable - SUCCESS

Frontend: Distribution summary cards show counts for all 6 categories with percentages (8 Bullish Aligned 35%, 6 Bearish Aligned 26%, 0 Momentum 0%, 1 Near Miss 4%, 4 Mixed 17%, 4 Conflict 17%) - SUCCESS
Frontend: Sort buttons work (confidence, rel vol, mtf score, category) - SUCCESS
Frontend: Direction filter buttons work (ALL, LONG, SHORT) - SUCCESS
Frontend: Heatmap table shows color-coded cells for 15m trend, 5m structure, 1m timing - SUCCESS
Frontend: MTF Status column shows correct category badges (Bullish Aligned=green, Bearish Aligned=red, Conflict=orange, Near Miss=amber) - SUCCESS
Frontend: Confidence scores match backend data - SUCCESS
Frontend: BUY/SELL action badges in Rejection/Notes column are correct (LONG→BUY, SHORT→SELL) - SUCCESS
Frontend: Clicking a category distribution card filters the table to that category - SUCCESS
critical_code_review_comments: MTFClassifier correctly classifies stocks into 6 categories using cached TA data at zero extra cost
Heatmap entries correctly include all required fields: symbol, category, direction, trend_15m, structure_5m, timing_1m, timing_status, confidence, rel_vol, above_vwap, setup_type, reject_reasons
Distribution object correctly tracks counts for all 6 categories
Dedicated /api/auto-trade/mtf-heatmap endpoint correctly calls scan_opportunities internally
Frontend MTFHeatmap component correctly renders distribution cards, sort buttons, direction filters, and color-coded table
Category badges correctly styled: Bullish Aligned=emerald/green, Bearish Aligned=red, Momentum=purple, Near Miss=amber, Mixed=slate, Conflict=orange
Timeframe cells correctly color-coded: bullish=emerald, bearish=red, ranging=slate, entry_ready=emerald, early=amber, weak=red
seed_data_creation: None required - using live market data from Polygon API and cached TA signals
context_for_next_testing_agent: MTF Heatmap feature fully tested. Key features verified: 1) /api/auto-trade/scan returns mtf_heatmap array and mtf_heatmap_distribution object. 2) mtf_heatmap_distribution has all 6 categories: BULLISH_ALIGNED, BEARISH_ALIGNED, MOMENTUM_CANDIDATE, NEAR_MISS, MIXED, CONFLICT. 3) Heatmap entries have all required fields. 4) Category classification is consistent with MTF data. 5) Direction consistency verified (BULLISH_ALIGNED→LONG, BEARISH_ALIGNED→SHORT). 6) Dedicated /api/auto-trade/mtf-heatmap endpoint works. 7) Frontend MTF Heatmap tab exists between 'Long' and 'Trade Log' tabs. 8) Distribution summary cards show counts and percentages. 9) Sort and filter buttons work. 10) Color-coded table cells and category badges display correctly. 11) BUY/SELL action badges correct (LONG→BUY, SHORT→SELL).

scan_endpoint.mtf_heatmap_distribution: Returns object with counts for all 6 categories
